# Data Dictionary — MWS

Tag inventory and field reference for `csl-orig/v02/mw/mw.txt`.

*Generated by the markup-fix-audit pass (2026-05-22). Counts reflect the state
of `mw.txt` at the time of the audit. Audit file: `mwissues/markup_fix/markup_audit.txt`.*

---

## Record structure

Each dictionary entry spans from `<L>NNNN` to `<LEND>`. The header fields are
space-separated on the first line and are not XML-tagged:

```
<L>103697<pc>527,2<k1>napAtka<k2>napAtka<e>2
```

| Field | Example | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `<L>N` | `<L>103697` | Record number; decimals like `116525.7` mark sub-entries |
| `<pc>P,C` | `<pc>527,2` | Page and column in the print edition |
| `<k1>word` | `<k1>napAtka` | Primary headword in SLP1, no accents |
| `<k2>word` | `<k2>napAtka` | Secondary headword in SLP1; may include Vedic accent marks |
| `<e>N` | `<e>2` | Hierarchy/homophone code |

---

## Paired content tags

Tags that wrap text spans inside an entry body.
Counts are opening+closing pairs (balanced unless noted).

| Tag | Count | Role | Example |
|---|---|---|---|
| `<s>` | 350,610 | Sanskrit text (SLP1 → IAST/Deva at display) | `<s>napAtka</s>` |
| `<lex>` | 201,941 | Grammatical category / part of speech | `<lex>m.</lex>` |
| `<ab>` | 194,879 | Abbreviation (resolves via `<ab>` tooltip system) | `<ab>cf.</ab>` |
| `<ls>` | 320,827 | Literary source reference | `<ls>RV.</ls>` |
| `<lang>` | 3,968 | Foreign language label | `<lang>Gk.</lang>` |
| `<bot>` | 8,923 | Botanical name | `<bot>Ficus benghalensis</bot>` |
| `<bio>` | 358 | Biographical name | `<bio>Pāṇini</bio>` |
| `<zoo>` | 0 | Zoological name | `<zoo>Elephas maximus</zoo>` |
| `<b>` | 0 | Bold / emphasis | `<b>word</b>` |
| `<i>` | 197 | Italic / transliteration note | `<i>id est</i>` |

<!-- Add additional tags found in this dict above this comment. -->

---

## Self-closing / attribute tags

| Tag | Count | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `<info …/>` | 292,603 | Grammatical attribute packet (`lex="m:f:n"`, `vn="…"`, etc.) |
| `<ab n="…">` | 12,779 | Abbreviation with explicit expansion in `n` attribute |

---

## Inline markup (non-XML)

| Marker | Role | Example |
|---|---|---|
| `{#…#}` | Devanagari / SLP1 span | `{#kf#}` |
| `{%…%}` | Italic text span | `{%also written%}` |
| `¦` | Definition separator | between headword and gloss |
| `@` | Cross-reference marker | `@mw` |

---

## Correction-record format

In-file corrections use double-brace records:
```
{{old text -> new text || YYYY-MM-DD | author | URL |}}
```
These are preserved verbatim and processed by the `updateByLine.py` toolchain.

---

## Known markup oddities (from markup-fix-audit)

See `mwissues/markup_fix/markup_audit.txt` for annotated samples.

| Pattern | Count | Disposition |
|---|---|---|
| Nested `<ab>` | auto-fixed | Auto-fixed by `08_markup_fix.py` |
| `<ab n="?">` placeholders | 0 | Already resolved; all 12,779 `<ab n="…">` have real expansions |
| Adjacent `</ab> <ab>` | 9,313 | Intentional two-abbreviation pairs; audit-only |
| Nested `<ls>` outside corrections | 0 | Clean |
| Whitespace inside tags | auto-trimmed | Auto-trimmed by `08_markup_fix.py` |

---

## Abbreviations

Abbreviations appearing as `<ab>X</ab>` resolve to expansions defined in the
CDSL abbreviation system. The canonical list is at:
[MWS mwabbreviations/mwab_input.txt](https://github.com/sanskrit-lexicon/MWS/blob/master/mwabbreviations/mwab_input.txt)
